_comment: Glossary fed to the LLM by scripts/seed-translations.mjs. doNotTranslate terms must appear verbatim in every language (brand names, file formats, units, third-party names). notes give per-domain guidance so motorsport jargon is rendered idiomatically rather than literally.
notes: This is a motorsport telemetry app (karting, sim racing, track days). Use racing terminology a driver would recognise in the target language.

'lap' = a single time around the circuit; 'sector' = a timed segment of a lap; 'track'/'course' = the circuit layout; 'datalog'/'log' = a recorded session file; 'reference lap' = the lap others are compared against.
'G-force' is the lateral/longitudinal acceleration; keep the unit symbol 'G' verbatim.
Keep UI text concise — these are buttons, labels and short hints in a dense settings panel.
Preserve every {{placeholder}} and <tag> exactly as written; do not translate, reorder, or add them.
Preserve leading/trailing spaces and punctuation (e.g. a trailing space after '= ').
